risk_if_not_implemented: Without Insider Threat Awareness, personnel may lack knowledge to recognize threats, increasing susceptibility to phishing and social engineering.

compensating_control_1.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Awareness Training
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to provide all employees and contractors appropriate security, compliance and resilience awareness education and training that is relevant for their job function.
compensating_control_1.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Awareness Training (SAT-02) provides personnel training and awareness that compensates for the absence of Insider Threat Awareness (THR-05) by reducing human-factor risk by equipping personnel to recognize and respond to relevant threats. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Reporting Suspicious Activities
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to enable personnel to report suspicious activities and/or behavior without fear of reprisal or other negative consequences (e.g., whistleblower protections).
compensating_control_2.justification: Reporting Suspicious Activities (HRS-15) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Insider Threat Awareness (THR-05) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
